subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-12-20 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: Today I came down here. It was a pleasant walk. Praise be to God, that, through the favor
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز رفتم یک قدری تا این پائین ها راه رفتم خوب بود عجب است انسان اگر توی
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @Shrines and Holy places, @suffering and imprisonment
